case_name: Culture/Arts DA Capture - Grupo Farla at SEGOB/SecCultura/CasaMoneda
source_news: ARIA T3 scan. 68 contracts, 709M MXN. 190M at SEGOB in 100% DA (2010-2011), 222M at Secretaria de Cultura (55% DA, 45% SB), 153M at Casa de Moneda (82% DA). Three separate cultural institutions all awarding heavy DA to same vendor over 14 years. Pattern: diversified capture across cultural sector institutions.
notes: No RFC on file. No EFOS/SFP hits. Pattern flags: high DA at SEGOB and Casa de Moneda, single-bid wins at INAH (86% SB). Sector classified as educacion (cultural institutions). Fraud estimate = SEGOB 190M + SecCultura 222M + CasaMoneda 153M = 564M in DA/SB contracts.

case_name: IT Single-Bid Monopoly Across Multiple Institutions - INNDOT
source_news: ARIA T3 scan. 23 contracts, 460M MXN. 61% overall single-bid rate. 100% SB at CONAVI (135M), BANOBRAS (113M), Gob Nuevo Leon (56M), CAPUFE (34M), Agua y Drenaje Monterrey (22M), FIRA (17M), FONATUR (6M). IT company that enters LP procedures across 10+ federal/state institutions and never faces competition. Only non-SB contracts are DA at IMPI (86% DA) and CONAGUA (100% DA). Pattern: systematic single-bid dominance in technology procurement across unrelated institutions.
notes: No RFC on file. No EFOS/SFP hits. Hacienda sector classification. Unlike structural monopolies (pharma patents), IT services have many competitors. Winning SB across CONAVI, BANOBRAS, CAPUFE, state government, FONATUR - all different procurement offices, all failing to attract competing bidders. Strong pattern of specifications tailored to exclude competitors.

case_name: ISSSTE Pharma DA Capture + Anomalous Airport Contract - Liber Salus
source_news: ARIA T3 scan. 128 contracts, 226M MXN. 93M at ISSSTE (44% DA, 52 contracts, 2014-2019), 11M at IMSS (74% DA, 27 contracts). Also: single 103M contract at Aeropuerto Internacional de la Ciudad de Mexico (100% SB, 2020) - pharma company winning airport infrastructure-class contract is sector mismatch anomaly.
notes: No RFC on file. No EFOS/SFP hits. Salud sector. The airport contract (103M, single LP bid) is the strongest anomaly - a pharma supplier winning at an airport. ISSSTE DA concentration (44%) moderate but sustained over 6 years (2014-2019). IMSS DA rate (74%) on smaller contracts. Fraud estimate = ISSSTE 93M + airport 103M.
